title: Vanillash Cobblemon
description: A lightweight and beautiful vanilla-like Cobblemon experience
body:
# 🧪 Vanillash Cobblemon
**A lightweight and beautiful almost vanilla experience.**

Vanillash Cobblemon is a modpack created to be lightweight and optimized for a vanilla-like experience, based on [adrenaline](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adrenaline) with the addition of some quality of life (QoL) mods among other mods that improve Minecraft but without sacrificing performance.

#### Mods:

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Displays more information about food-related values.
- [Backpacked](https://github.com/MrCrayfish/Backpacked) - A vanilla-friendly backpack mod, featuring unlock-based progression, an augment system, customisation, pickpocketing, and addon support!
- [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) - Adds the Pokémon to your Minecraft.
- [Dynamic Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamiccrosshair) - Changes the crosshair depending on what is being looked at.
- [EMI](https://modrinth.com/mod/emi) - Adds an item and recipe viewer, integrates with JEI.
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) - Adds falling leaf and snow particles.
- [Just Enough Items](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) - Adds an item and recipe viewer.
- [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - Adds dynamic lights.
- [Presence Footsteps](https://modrinth.com/mod/presence-footsteps) - Makes footsteps sound better and more dynamic.
- [ShulkerBoxTooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - Allows viewing the contents of shulker boxes in your inventory with "Shift".
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) - Adds various particle effects to blocks and entities.
- [Xaero's Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-minimap) - Displays a minimap of nearby terrain, players, and entities, and allows waypoint use.
- [Xaero's World Map](https://modrinth.com/mod/xaeros-world-map) - Adds a full-screen world map.
